name: SABMiller PLC
description: SABMiller plc was a prominent Anglo–South African multinational brewing and beverage company headquartered in Woking, England. Formed in 2002 through the acquisition of Miller Brewing Company by South African Breweries, it grew into one of the world's largest brewers with a vast portfolio of international beer brands. The company pursued an aggressive global expansion strategy across multiple continents until October 2016, when it was acquired by Anheuser-Busch InBev for approximately US$107 billion. Following this historic takeover, SABMiller ceased to exist as an independent entity and became a business division of AB InBev.
